events.d: APPROVED_SKIP: relocation step — acceptance test for this step's invariants un-skips in step 01-05 after all post-MR-0 file-system sentinels land

APPROVED_SKIP: framework-mode route module is exercised end-to-end by the Phase 02 acceptance suite (un-skipped in Step 02-03). Internal calls (new QueryClient, dehydrate, HydrationBoundary) are TanStack Query / RRv7 library boundaries; a unit test mocking them would test the library, not our code. Per CLAUDE.md 'Mocks only at port boundaries. No internal class mocks.' The existing vitest suite covers LoginPage (the wrapped component).

PASS: Read AppShell/index.tsx, providers/QueryProvider.tsx, 2 test files, conftest.py, distill feature file (inner-provider-removed scenario), wave-decisions.md DD-12 verbatim reason confirmed. Pre-flight greps confirm: QueryProvider component imported only by AppShell; queryClient named export from providers/QueryProvider.tsx has zero consumers; all other queryClient references are local test variables, useQueryClient hooks, or local QueryClient instances. Safe to delete providers/QueryProvider.tsx outright. Note: frontend/app/routes/app-shell.tsx contains a comment referencing the inner <QueryProvider /> which becomes stale after this step.

APPROVED_SKIP: this step is a structural refactor (drop a provider wrap + delete a no-consumer module + un-skip pytest markers). No new unit-testable behavior. The vitest suite is the regression boundary; the acceptance suite is the contract boundary.

PASS: 9 Phase 02 scenarios un-skipped at module level; 3 placeholders re-marked at function level with DD-12 verbatim reason. Iron Rule honored: pytest.fail bodies of the 3 deferred placeholders preserved verbatim, only @skip decorators added.
